tree.setup: You're presenting your research findings at an academic seminar. A professor in the audience asks about your methodology and conclusions.
tree.setup_zh: 你在学术研讨会上报告你的研究成果。一位教授对你的方法和结论提出了问题。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你的研究很有意思。请问你用的是什么研究方法？你的数据是怎么收集的？另外，你的假设是基于什么提出的？
turns.text_pinyin: nǐ de yánjiū hěn yǒu yìsi. qǐngwèn nǐ yòng de shì shénme yánjiū fāngfǎ? nǐ de shùjù shì zěnme shōují de? lìngwài, nǐ de jiǎshè shì jīyú shénme tíchū de?
turns.text_en: Your research is very interesting. What research method did you use? How was your data collected? Also, what was your hypothesis based on?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Explain your research methodology and hypothesis.

options.text_zh: 这正是我接下来要重点阐述的部分。我们从三个维度构建了风险防控体系。第一，汇率风险方面，我们计划在目标市场开设本币账户，并通过远期合约锁定主要交易的汇率，将汇率波动的敞口控制在总投资的百分之五以内。第二，政策与合规风险方面，我们已经聘请了在越南和泰国都有执业资质的国际律所作为合规顾问，确保每一步都符合当地法规。同时我们选择以合资模式进入，与本地合作伙伴共担政策风险。第三，关于退出机制，我们设定了明确的里程碑指标：如果进入第十二个月，核心市场的客户获取成本仍高于预设阈值的百分之三十，或者收入增速低于预期的百分之五十，则自动触发战略评审。退出方案包括将业务转让给本地合作伙伴或分阶段撤出，确保沉没成本可控。
options.text_pinyin: zhè zhèng shì wǒ jiēxiàlái yào zhòngdiǎn chǎnshù de bùfèn. wǒmen cóng sān gè wéidù gòujiàn le fēngxiǎn fángkòng tǐxì. dì yī, huìlǜ fēngxiǎn fāngmiàn, wǒmen jìhuà zài mùbiāo shìchǎng kāishè běn bì zhànghù, bìng tōngguò yuǎnqī héyuē suǒdìng zhǔyào jiāoyì de huìlǜ, jiāng huìlǜ bōdòng de chǎngkǒu kòngzhì zài zǒng tóuzī de bǎifēnzhī wǔ yǐnèi. dì èr, zhèngcè yǔ héguī fēngxiǎn fāngmiàn, wǒmen yǐjīng pìnqǐng le zài yuènán hé tàiguó dōu yǒu zhíyè zīzhì de guójì lǜsuǒ zuòwéi héguī gùwèn, quèbǎo měi yī bù dōu fúhé dāngdì fǎguī. tóngshí wǒmen xuǎnzé yǐ hézī móshì jìnrù, yǔ běndì hézuò huǒbàn gòng dān zhèngcè fēngxiǎn. dì sān, guānyú tuìchū jīzhì, wǒmen shèdìng le míngquè de lǐchéngbēi zhǐbiāo: rúguǒ jìnrù dì shí'èr gè yuè, héxīn shìchǎng de kèhù huòqǔ chéngběn réng gāoyú yùshè yùzhí de bǎifēnzhī sānshí, huòzhě shōurù zēngsù dīyú yùqī de bǎifēnzhī wǔshí, zé zìdòng chùfā zhànlüè pínshěn. tuìchū fāng'àn bāokuò jiāng yèwù zhuǎnràng gěi běndì hézuò huǒbàn huò fēn jiēduàn chèchū, quèbǎo chénmò chéngběn kě kòng.
options.text_en: This is precisely what I want to elaborate on next. We've built a risk prevention system across three dimensions. First, on exchange rate risk, we plan to open local currency accounts in target markets and lock in exchange rates for major transactions through forward contracts, keeping exchange rate exposure within 5% of total investment. Second, on policy and compliance risk, we've engaged an international law firm licensed in both Vietnam and Thailand as compliance advisors, ensuring every step complies with local regulations. We're also entering through a joint venture model, sharing policy risk with local partners. Third, regarding the exit mechanism, we've set clear milestone indicators: if by month twelve, the customer acquisition cost in core markets remains more than 30% above the preset threshold, or revenue growth falls below 50% of projections, a strategic review is automatically triggered. Exit options include transferring operations to local partners or phased withdrawal, ensuring sunk costs remain manageable.
options.feedback: Off-topic — you were asked to explain your research methodology and hypothesis, but this doesn't fit the conversation.

options.text_zh: 感谢陈总的诚意，我们非常重视这次合作的机会。关于独家分销权，我们原则上可以考虑，但需要附加业绩保证条款。坦白讲，我们不能把一个战略性市场完全锁定给一家合作伙伴三年，却没有任何绩效约束。我的建议是：第一年设定一个基础销售额目标，达标后自动续期独家权；如果连续两个季度未能完成目标的百分之七十，我们保留引入其他分销商的权利。这样既保护了你们的投资回报，也保障了我们的市场覆盖效率。这个框架您觉得可以作为讨论的基础吗？
options.text_pinyin: gǎnxiè chén zǒng de chéngyì, wǒmen fēicháng zhòngshì zhè cì hézuò de jīhuì. guānyú dújiā fēnxiāo quán, wǒmen yuánzé shàng kěyǐ kǎolǜ, dàn xūyào fùjiā yèjì bǎozhèng tiáokuǎn. tǎnbái jiǎng, wǒmen bù néng bǎ yī gè zhànlüè xìng shìchǎng wánquán suǒdìng gěi yī jiā hézuò huǒbàn sān nián, què méiyǒu rènhé jìxiào yuēshù. wǒ de jiànyì shì: dì yī nián shèdìng yī gè jīchǔ xiāoshòu'é mùbiāo, dábiāo hòu zìdòng xùqī dújiā quán; rúguǒ liánxù liǎng gè jìdù wèi néng wánchéng mùbiāo de bǎifēnzhī qīshí, wǒmen bǎoliú yǐnrù qítā fēnxiāo shāng de quánlì. zhèyàng jì bǎohù le nǐmen de tóuzī huíbào, yě bǎozhàng le wǒmen de shìchǎng fùgài xiàolǜ. zhège kuàngjià nín juéde kěyǐ zuòwéi tǎolùn de jīchǔ ma?
options.text_en: Thank you Mr. Chen for your sincerity -- we greatly value this partnership opportunity. Regarding exclusive distribution rights, we can consider it in principle, but with performance guarantee clauses attached. Frankly, we can't lock a strategic market entirely to one partner for three years without any performance constraints. My suggestion is: set a baseline sales target for year one, with exclusivity automatically renewed upon achievement; if the target falls below 70% for two consecutive quarters, we reserve the right to introduce additional distributors. This protects both your investment returns and our market coverage efficiency. Could this framework serve as a basis for discussion?
options.feedback: Off-topic — you were asked to explain your research methodology and hypothesis, but this doesn't fit the conversation.

options.text_zh: 谢谢您的提问。我们的研究方法主要是定量分析与定性分析相结合。数据来源于对五百名受访者的问卷调查。我们的假设是基于前人的研究发现提出的——已有论证表明这个领域存在明显的趋势变化，我们希望通过新的数据来验证。
options.text_pinyin: xièxie nín de tíwèn. wǒmen de yánjiū fāngfǎ zhǔyào shì dìngliàng fēnxī yǔ dìngxìng fēnxī xiāng jiéhé. shùjù láiyuán yú duì wǔbǎi míng shòufǎngzhě de wènjuàn diàochá. wǒmen de jiǎshè shì jīyú qiánrén de yánjiū fāxiàn tíchū de——yǐ yǒu lùnzhèng biǎomíng zhège lǐngyù cúnzài míngxiǎn de qūshì biànhuà, wǒmen xīwàng tōngguò xīn de shùjù lái yànzhèng.
options.text_en: Thank you for your question. Our research method primarily combines quantitative and qualitative analysis. The data comes from a survey of five hundred respondents. Our hypothesis was based on previous research findings — existing evidence indicates a clear trend shift in this field, and we wanted to verify this with new data.
options.feedback: Excellent academic response — addresses 方法, 数据, 假设, and 论证 systematically. Uses 研究, 发现, 假设 with scholarly precision.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 明白了。那你的主要结论是什么？你的发现是否支持了最初的假设？
turns.text_pinyin: míngbai le. nà nǐ de zhǔyào jiélùn shì shénme? nǐ de fāxiàn shìfǒu zhīchí le zuìchū de jiǎshè?
turns.text_en: I see. So what is your main conclusion? Did your findings support the original hypothesis?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Present your conclusions and whether they supported your hypothesis.

options.text_zh: 陈主任您好。关于症状方面，最近半年我确实偶尔会感到胸口发闷，特别是在爬楼梯或者快走的时候，休息几分钟就能缓解。另外偶尔会觉得左肩有点酸痛，不确定跟心脏有没有关系。气短的情况不明显，但晚上有时候会觉得心跳不太规律，像是跳了一拍又停一下。家族病史方面，我父亲在五十五岁的时候被诊断出冠心病，做过一次支架手术。我母亲有高血压和高血脂的问题。我的叔叔五十岁的时候因为心肌梗死去世了。所以心血管疾病在我们家族中有比较明显的遗传倾向。
options.text_pinyin: chén zhǔrèn nín hǎo. guānyú zhèngzhuàng fāngmiàn, zuìjìn bàn nián wǒ quèshí ǒu'ěr huì gǎn dào xiōngkǒu fāmèn, tèbié shì zài pá lóutī huòzhě kuài zǒu de shíhou, xiūxi jǐ fēnzhōng jiù néng huǎnjiě. lìngwài ǒu'ěr huì juéde zuǒ jiān yǒudiǎn suānténg, bù quèdìng gēn xīnzàng yǒu méiyǒu guānxì. qìduǎn de qíngkuàng bù míngxiǎn, dàn wǎnshang yǒushíhou huì juéde xīntiào bú tài guīlǜ, xiàng shì tiào le yī pāi yòu tíng yīxià. jiāzú bìngshǐ fāngmiàn, wǒ fùqīn zài wǔshíwǔ suì de shíhou bèi zhěnduàn chū guānxīnbìng, zuò guò yī cì zhījià shǒushù. wǒ mǔqīn yǒu gāo xuèyā hé gāo xuèzhī de wèntí. wǒ de shūshu wǔshí suì de shíhou yīnwèi xīnjī gěngsǐ qùshì le. suǒyǐ xīn xuèguǎn jíbìng zài wǒmen jiāzú zhōng yǒu bǐjiào míngxiǎn de yíchuán qīngxiàng.
options.text_en: Hello Director Chen. Regarding symptoms, over the past six months I've occasionally felt chest tightness, especially when climbing stairs or walking fast -- it resolves after a few minutes of rest. I also occasionally feel soreness in my left shoulder, though I'm not sure if it's heart-related. Shortness of breath isn't obvious, but at night I sometimes feel my heartbeat is irregular -- like it beats once then pauses. For family history, my father was diagnosed with coronary heart disease at 55 and had a stent procedure. My mother has hypertension and hyperlipidemia. My uncle passed away from myocardial infarction at 50. So cardiovascular disease has a fairly clear hereditary tendency in our family.
options.feedback: Off-topic — you were asked to present your conclusions and whether they supported your hypothesis, but this doesn't fit the conversation.

options.text_zh: 我们的结论是：数据基本支持了最初的假设，但也有一些出乎意料的发现。研究表明，这个趋势确实存在，不过影响因素比我们预想的更加复杂。这些新的发现为未来的研究提供了新的方向，也对现有的论证做了有益的补充。
options.text_pinyin: wǒmen de jiélùn shì: shùjù jīběn zhīchí le zuìchū de jiǎshè, dàn yě yǒu yīxiē chūhū yìliào de fāxiàn. yánjiū biǎomíng, zhège qūshì quèshí cúnzài, búguò yǐngxiǎng yīnsù bǐ wǒmen yùxiǎng de gèngjiā fùzá. zhèxiē xīn de fāxiàn wèi wèilái de yánjiū tígōng le xīn de fāngxiàng, yě duì xiànyǒu de lùnzhèng zuò le yǒuyì de bǔchōng.
options.text_en: Our conclusion is that the data largely supports the original hypothesis, but there were also some unexpected findings. The research shows the trend does exist, though the influencing factors are more complex than we anticipated. These new findings provide new directions for future research and offer a valuable supplement to existing scholarship.
options.feedback: Outstanding — presents 结论 with appropriate nuance (基本支持 rather than absolute), acknowledges complexity, and connects 发现 to future 研究. Uses 假设, 论证, 结论, 发现 at an advanced academic level.

options.text_zh: 这正是我接下来要重点阐述的部分。我们从三个维度构建了风险防控体系。第一，汇率风险方面，我们计划在目标市场开设本币账户，并通过远期合约锁定主要交易的汇率，将汇率波动的敞口控制在总投资的百分之五以内。第二，政策与合规风险方面，我们已经聘请了在越南和泰国都有执业资质的国际律所作为合规顾问，确保每一步都符合当地法规。同时我们选择以合资模式进入，与本地合作伙伴共担政策风险。第三，关于退出机制，我们设定了明确的里程碑指标：如果进入第十二个月，核心市场的客户获取成本仍高于预设阈值的百分之三十，或者收入增速低于预期的百分之五十，则自动触发战略评审。退出方案包括将业务转让给本地合作伙伴或分阶段撤出，确保沉没成本可控。
options.text_pinyin: zhè zhèng shì wǒ jiēxiàlái yào zhòngdiǎn chǎnshù de bùfèn. wǒmen cóng sān gè wéidù gòujiàn le fēngxiǎn fángkòng tǐxì. dì yī, huìlǜ fēngxiǎn fāngmiàn, wǒmen jìhuà zài mùbiāo shìchǎng kāishè běn bì zhànghù, bìng tōngguò yuǎnqī héyuē suǒdìng zhǔyào jiāoyì de huìlǜ, jiāng huìlǜ bōdòng de chǎngkǒu kòngzhì zài zǒng tóuzī de bǎifēnzhī wǔ yǐnèi. dì èr, zhèngcè yǔ héguī fēngxiǎn fāngmiàn, wǒmen yǐjīng pìnqǐng le zài yuènán hé tàiguó dōu yǒu zhíyè zīzhì de guójì lǜsuǒ zuòwéi héguī gùwèn, quèbǎo měi yī bù dōu fúhé dāngdì fǎguī. tóngshí wǒmen xuǎnzé yǐ hézī móshì jìnrù, yǔ běndì hézuò huǒbàn gòng dān zhèngcè fēngxiǎn. dì sān, guānyú tuìchū jīzhì, wǒmen shèdìng le míngquè de lǐchéngbēi zhǐbiāo: rúguǒ jìnrù dì shí'èr gè yuè, héxīn shìchǎng de kèhù huòqǔ chéngběn réng gāoyú yùshè yùzhí de bǎifēnzhī sānshí, huòzhě shōurù zēngsù dīyú yùqī de bǎifēnzhī wǔshí, zé zìdòng chùfā zhànlüè pínshěn. tuìchū fāng'àn bāokuò jiāng yèwù zhuǎnràng gěi běndì hézuò huǒbàn huò fēn jiēduàn chèchū, quèbǎo chénmò chéngběn kě kòng.
options.text_en: This is precisely what I want to elaborate on next. We've built a risk prevention system across three dimensions. First, on exchange rate risk, we plan to open local currency accounts in target markets and lock in exchange rates for major transactions through forward contracts, keeping exchange rate exposure within 5% of total investment. Second, on policy and compliance risk, we've engaged an international law firm licensed in both Vietnam and Thailand as compliance advisors, ensuring every step complies with local regulations. We're also entering through a joint venture model, sharing policy risk with local partners. Third, regarding the exit mechanism, we've set clear milestone indicators: if by month twelve, the customer acquisition cost in core markets remains more than 30% above the preset threshold, or revenue growth falls below 50% of projections, a strategic review is automatically triggered. Exit options include transferring operations to local partners or phased withdrawal, ensuring sunk costs remain manageable.
options.feedback: Off-topic — you were asked to present your conclusions and whether they supported your hypothesis, but this doesn't fit the conversation.

tree.cultural_note: In Chinese academic settings, presenters are expected to show both confidence in their 研究 and intellectual humility. Stating that data '基本支持' (largely supports) rather than '证明' (proves) a hypothesis demonstrates scholarly rigor and is viewed more favorably than overclaiming.
